_doc: 🆕 [H.3 / Sir 2026-05-28 15:40 真痛 image 1 anchor] AutoArbiter protocol 两层耦合 vocab.
'Never start reply with You re absolutely right'
Sir 真意 (image 1 严格把关):
- protocol 是 STRICT, 不能 vague / 不能 jarvis 自嗨 / 必含 imperative verb
- Sir 真说过想要这 rule (复述 / sal high) 才强 ACT
强 ACT 信号 (任 1 hit → bypass LLM 直 activate):
(a) STM Sir 复述 rule (token overlap ≥ min_rule_token_overlap)
强 REJ 信号 (任 1 hit → bypass LLM 直 reject):
(a) rule 词数 < min_rule_words (太短不是 rule)
(b) rule 字数 > max_rule_chars (太长不是 atomic rule)
(c) rule 不含 imperative verb (Sir 真意 rule 必命令式)
注: vague abstract 现 _llm_evaluate path 的 abstract_reject_vocab pre-reject 已 cover
无强信号 → LLM edge case fallback.
准则 6 持久化, Sir CLI scripts/auto_arbiter_protocol_vocab_dump.py 可改.

_doc_config: imperative_verbs: rule 必含至少 1 个 (任 lang) 才算命令式 protocol
min_rule_token_overlap: Sir 复述 rule 词级 overlap ≥ N → 强 ACT
min_rule_words: rule 词数 < N 直 reject (太短)
max_rule_chars: rule 字数 > N 直 reject (太长不是 atomic)
stm_lookback_turns: STM 扫近 N turn (复述 detect)
log_decisions: bg_log 每次 strong-gate hit
